name: GBank Financial Holdings Inc.
summary: GBank Financial Holdings Inc. operates as a bank holding company for the Bank of George that provides various banking products and services in the United States. It offers business and personal checking accounts, savings accounts, money market accounts, and certificates of deposit; commercial real estate, equipment, business, small business administration, and personal loans, as well as credit cards. The company also provides cash management and digital banking services. GBank Financial Holdings, Inc. was founded in 2007 and is based in Las Vegas, Nevada.
